description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to run a job on macos, ubuntu, and windows environments with Node.js 12.x. For each job, check out the Grin++ Backend, Grin++ UI, and vcpkg repositories, set up the environment, cache vcpkg artifacts, run vcpkg, set up Node.js, run CMake, upload artifacts, and perform additional steps for manifest versioning and UI building on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
